overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk through downtown Los Santos. The player navigates urban sidewalks past neon-lit commercial buildings, crosses intersections with passing traffic, and walks through a city canyon with towering glass skyscrapers and illuminated billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon-lit commercial strip

events.description: city bus passes by on the left side of the street
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a building with blue and red neon lights

notable_agents.action: city bus driving in the same direction as the camera, then pulling to the curb

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with prominent blue and red neon strip lighting along the roofline
standard yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
tall construction crane with red lights visible against the night sky
white billboard with red text reading YOUR AD HERE

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban sidewalk beside a commercial building illuminated with blue and red neon lights. A yellow fire hydrant sits near the curb. A city bus passes by on the left, and a construction crane is visible in the distance. The camera moves forward steadily, approaching an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and tall buildings

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of the camera
crossing the intersection and turning right, revealing Premium Deluxe Motorsport and tall skyscrapers
camera looks up at the illuminated skyscrapers, shifting from street-level neon to building facade lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning to view the tall downtown buildings, then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with glass facades dominating the skyline
black traffic light pole with illuminated signals
car dealership with blue and red neon signage reading Premium Deluxe Motorsport
tall illuminated billboard with colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses an urban intersection, passing a pedestrian crossing from left to right. Upon reaching the other side, the view opens up to reveal the Premium Deluxe Motorsport dealership with bright neon signage and towering glass skyscrapers illuminated against the night sky. The camera briefly looks up at the tall buildings before continuing along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with car dealership and large advertising billboards

events.description: black car drives past on the left side of the street
passing the Motorsport dealership and entering a narrower street section with older buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Premium Deluxe Motorsport dealership with tall skyscrapers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: older multi-story building with weathered exterior and small windows
narrow alley entrance between buildings with red neon lighting visible

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk with the Premium Deluxe Motorsport dealership on the right and massive illuminated billboards overhead. The tall glass skyscrapers loom ahead on the left. A black car passes by on the street. The camera continues past the dealership into a slightly narrower section with older urban buildings and a visible alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown urban canyon with tall office towers and commercial storefronts

events.description: passing a second yellow fire hydrant and continuing deeper into the downtown canyon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the downtown canyon with towering skyscrapers on the left and commercial buildings on the right

entered.detail: storefront with dark awning extending over the sidewalk
stack of cardboard boxes and debris on the sidewalk
wooden utility pole with street lamp and wires

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a narrow downtown urban canyon. The tall glass skyscrapers now dominate the left side at close range, their illuminated windows creating a wall of light. The right side features commercial buildings with awnings and occasional debris like cardboard boxes on the sidewalk. The street is quiet with no visible traffic or pedestrians as the camera maintains a steady walking pace through the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-lit downtown district that gradually transitions from a wide commercial street into a towering urban canyon. It begins on a nighttime sidewalk beside a building glowing with blue and red neon, moving past a yellow fire hydrant as a city bus passes by. As the camera crosses a pedestrian intersection, the view opens up to reveal the bright signage of the Premium Deluxe Motorsport dealership and a skyline of illuminated glass skyscrapers. The scene then shifts along the sidewalk past massive overhead billboards and a passing black car before turning into a narrower corridor of older urban buildings and alleyways. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the city center where the towering skyscrapers dominate the left side as a wall of light, contrasting with the quiet, debris-strewn sidewalks of the commercial buildings on the right.
